ui_click.description: Soft low-volume UI tap. Source: Kenney Interface Sounds CC0 click_001.

ui_error.description: Polite invalid-action knock/drop. Source: Kenney Interface Sounds CC0 drop_001.

cast.description: Soft cast/line rustle. Source: 202 More Sound Effects CC0 Cloth_05.

bobber_splash.description: Small bobber water entry. Source: 40 CC0 water/splash/slime SFX splash_09.

bite.description: Small bite/ripple cue. Source: 40 CC0 water/splash/slime SFX bubble_02.

catch_common.description: Gentle common catch water lift. Source: 40 CC0 water/splash/slime SFX splash_06.

catch_rare.description: Rare catch water lift plus soft confirmation. Sources: water splash_01 and Kenney confirmation_001 CC0.

coin.description: Soft pouch coin Foley. Source: 202 More Sound Effects CC0 Money_07.

upgrade.description: Quiet confirmation for upgrades. Source: Kenney Interface Sounds CC0 confirmation_001.

ambience_water_loop.description: Soft looping water ambience. Source: 40 CC0 water/splash/slime SFX loop_water_03.

amb_stream_loop.description: Seamless mountain-stream/riffle bed. Source: Freesound #433589 'jackthemurray' stream-river-water-up-close (via Wikimedia Commons), CC0.

amb_birds_day.description: Quiet daytime woodland birdsong bed. Source: OpenGameArt 'Ambient Bird Sounds' by isaiah658, CC0.

amb_wind_loop.description: Open-air wind bed. Source: OpenGameArt 'wind1' open-air wind, CC0.

amb_night_insects.description: Warm-night cricket bed. Source: OpenGameArt 'Crickets ambient noise (loopable)', CC0.

amb_waves_loop.description: Ocean swell bed (rolling surf). Source: OpenGameArt 'Beach Ocean Waves' by jasinski (alkai beach), CC0.

amb_gulls_day.description: Coastal gull bed (sparse calls). Source: OpenGameArt 'Solo Seagull Sound Effects' (Seagull Ambient), CC0.

amb_cave_drip.description: Cavern-pool water-drip bed. Source: OpenGameArt 'Dripping water loop' (atmosbasement), CC0.
